tool.name: n8n
tool.description: Workflow automation platform with strong self-hosting support and broad integration coverage.
tool.licenseWarning: n8n uses a Sustainable Use License, not MIT or Apache 2.0. It is more accurately described as source-available.

licenseHistory.sourceTitle: n8n: Announcing the new Sustainable Use License
licenseHistory.notes: Replaced the Commons Clause restriction with n8n's fair-code Sustainable Use License, explicitly permitting paid consulting/support. Both states are source-available, not OSI-approved.

tool.logoNotes: Official n8n wordmark asset from the n8n brand guidelines download page (`logo-dark.svg`).
tool.practitionerNote: Often the fastest path for ops-heavy teams that want broad integrations and self-hosting, though complex enterprise controls may need extra discipline around change management.

dataResidency.detail: n8n Cloud currently EU-only; self-hosted gives customer-controlled residency.

deployment.detail: Self-hosted (primary OSS mode), n8n Cloud (EU SaaS), or hybrid.

auditLogging.detail: Execution insights and log streaming; enterprise Cloud adds access logs; no immutable audit log for self-hosted OSS.

soc2.detail: Annual independent SOC 2 audit; SOC 3 public report; SOC 2 Type II to enterprise customers.

iso27001.detail: ISO 27001 not held; absent from the n8n security page / Trust Center.

iso42001.detail: Not mentioned in n8n public compliance documentation.

euAiAct.detail: Workflow automation tooling, not itself an AI system.

licenseRisk.detail: Sustainable Use License (source-available, fair-code, not OSI); EE features under a separate license.
